events.description: A list of events scheduled for the account holder.

payoutState.description: The payout state of the account holder.

processingState.description: The processing state of the account holder.

status.description:
The status of the account holder.
>Permitted values: `Active`, `Inactive`, `Suspended`, `Closed`.

statusReason.description: The reason why the status was assigned to the account holder.
